title: Whimscape x TrashSlot
description: An unofficial add-on pack for Whimscape that brings the style of Whimscape to the TrashSlot mod
body:
Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) and his resource pack [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape), which is the basis for this add-on pack.

this pack retexture the slot of the [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) mod to fit them to [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

![TrashSlot img 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7f420ee481ca7a63e84673aa8f0dd96a196dbc2.png)
![TrashSlot img 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36ffbd96125ce530cd3c762cbd3c365ed8415a92.png)
![TrashSlot img 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/418595de00ecd1c5eef5b4de0d64add2f2ba4a4d.png)
